response: The 2007 documentary "Zoo" was not more successful than the 1998 documentary "Divine Trash." While "Zoo" was selected as one of the top five American films at the 2007 Cannes Film Festival and debuted at the Sundance Film Festival, "Divine Trash" was a 1998 film directed by Steve Yeager and is not explicitly compared in terms of success to "Zoo." Therefore, there is no factual basis to conclude that "Zoo" was more successful than "Divine Trash."
